---
title: "About This Site"
description: "Additional details about this website."
author: null
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

## About This Website

This website was created for my GV300 module (Advanced Quantitative Politics) at the University of Essex.

It serves as a portfolio where I present examples of my data analysis and research work.

On this site, you can see how I:

- Analyse data using R  
- Create clear and easy-to-understand visualisations  
- Explain statistical results in simple language  
- Present academic work in a structured and organised way  

## How This Website Was Built

This website was built using:

- **R Markdown** to combine writing and code in one document  
- **Distill and Postcards themes** to create a clean and professional layout  
- **Git and GitHub** to manage and track changes  
- **GitHub Pages** to publish the website online  

The goal was to build a simple and professional academic portfolio that clearly demonstrates my skills in quantitative analysis and data communication.
